site.name: TwiceMax!
site.slogan: Learn most content on this site in at most two views, preferably once
rightsDeclaration: The right to learn knowledge without getting into a prestigious university
The right to prove yourself through ability, not defined by credentials
The right to freely explore interests, unbounded by traditional education
The right to learn from anyone, regardless of their background
The right to start over after failure, not limited by past mistakes
The right to question authority, think independently and express opinions
The right to learn at your own pace, not judged by standardized tests
The right to receive honest feedback and grow through practice
The right to choose non-traditional paths, pursuing passion over profit
The right to believe in lifelong learning, it's never too late
site.missionIntro: Together with you, we strive to achieve:
site.missionQuote: Any knowledge point here can be understood in just two reads

redisSync.title: Redis Statistics Data Sync
redisSync.description: Synchronize statistical data from Redis to the database to ensure data persistence and consistency. Usually used for periodic backups or disaster recovery.

redisSync.dateSyncDesc: Sync statistical data for a specific date. Leave empty to sync yesterday's data

intro.heroQuestion: What should it take to learn a bite of knowledge?
intro.feature1: Clear learning paths for every role you take on
intro.feature3: User voting surfaces the most understandable content
intro.feature4: Memory cards with smart spaced repetition review
intro.feature5: Structured knowledge with personalized learning paths
intro.screen3Title: Know what to learn first, then next

screen4Annotations.annotation4: Don't get it? Scroll down, there's one for you

intro.heroTitle:
Who do you want to become?
We'll help you plan the path
intro.heroSubtitle: From professional skills to life roles, from hobbies to self-improvement
intro.pathDesc: Each role has a dedicated knowledge tree, learn step by step, progress steadily
intro.tocDesc: Clear chapter structure, always know where you are
intro.tocTip: Click any chapter to jump to it
intro.twiceDesc: For each topic, community votes select the most understandable explanations
intro.twiceTip: Understand in two reads, at most twice
intro.reviewDesc: Based on Ebbinghaus forgetting curve, system automatically schedules reviews
intro.reviewTip: Never forget what you learned, knowledge truly becomes yours
intro.feature1Desc: Every role has a clear knowledge tree, just follow the order
intro.feature2Desc: For each topic, the most understandable explanation comes first
intro.feature3Desc: Smart review reminders help you truly master the knowledge
